prose:
Method–provenance block
• Property: frontier orbital energies (HOMO, LUMO) and HOMO–LUMO gap  
• Level of theory: DFT, tier ‘standard’ ≡ B3LYP/def2-TZVP with RI density fitting (PySCF)  
• Geometry provenance: single-point on the supplied fixed geometry /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz (no re-optimization)  
  └─ protocol shorthand: DFT//input-xyz  
• Environment: gas phase (no implicit or explicit solvent)  
• Charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell RHF/RKS)  
• Software/backend: PySCF (via chemkit frontier-orbitals skill)  
• SCF convergence: converged in 9 cycles; SCF_converged = true  
• Warnings: no warnings reported by the engine  
• Live log: calculation ran in real time; stdout/stderr streamed to an `.out` file in the caller’s CWD (path emitted at launch) and final JSON written to /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp4phvbfmo/live.json

Key results (all energies in eV)
• HOMO  (index 17):  −6.3597638 eV  
• LUMO  (index 18):  −0.1024036 eV  
• HOMO–LUMO gap   :   6.2573602 eV   ← headline value (Koopmans‐type orbital gap, not an excitation energy)

Additional Koopmans-derived descriptors
• Vertical ionisation potential (IP):  6.3597638 eV  
• Vertical electron affinity (EA):     0.1024036 eV  
• Electronegativity χ:                3.2310837 eV  
• Chemical hardness η:                3.1286801 eV  
• Chemical softness S:                0.3196236 (1/eV)  
• Electrophilicity index ω:           1.6684195 eV

Reproducibility
Command executed (from cli_invocation):
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp4phvbfmo/live.json  
Optimisation none; coordinates identical to input.  
The full result JSON (including orbital lists and integral metadata) is available at the path above.

Integrity check: status ok; trustworthy = true (all automated checks passed).
